mapper.insert: /* oms-po-poB2bDaysObQty-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpPoB2bDaysObQtyIntf */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_B2BAVGOBQTY_REQORDER ( CTKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , AVQTY , PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT CTKEY , ICKEY , CRITDAY , AVQTY , PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_B2BAVGOBQTY_BATCH WHERE TRN_ID = #{trnId} ON CONFLICT (CTKEY, ICKEY, CRITDAY) DO UPDATE SET AVQTY = EXCLUDED.AVQTY , PREIBQTY = EXCLUDED.PREIBQTY , IBEXPCTDAY = EXCLUDED.IBEXPCTDAY , IBEXPCTQTY = EXCLUDED.IBEXPCTQTY , AVGOBQTY = EXCLUDED.AVGOBQTY , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY
